pulse_items.title: Artemis II Crew Returns Safely to Earth
pulse_items.summary: NASA's Artemis II mission successfully concluded with splashdown in the Pacific Ocean. The four astronauts are being recovered as live footage shows their capsule bobbing in the water. This marks humanity's return to lunar orbit after decades.

pulse_items.title: Pragmata Pre-Load Breaks Steam Records
pulse_items.summary: Capcom's long-awaited sci-fi game Pragmata has shattered pre-load records on Steam with over 2 million downloads in 24 hours. Reddit gaming communities are exploding with speculation about the mysterious storyline and gameplay mechanics.

pulse_items.title: Microsoft Unveils Agentic AI at Azure Summit
pulse_items.summary: Microsoft announced breakthrough Agentic AI systems at their Azure Summit that can autonomously complete complex business workflows. The technology demonstrates AI agents coordinating across multiple applications without human intervention.

pulse_items.title: 'Quantum Kitchen' Cooking Trend Goes Viral
pulse_items.summary: TikTok creators are using molecular gastronomy techniques in home kitchens, creating edible spheres and foams with simple tools. The #QuantumKitchen hashtag has 500k videos with high save-to-view ratios as people attempt scientific cooking.

pulse_items.title: AI-Generated '90s Sitcom Parodies Explode
pulse_items.summary: AI tools are creating perfect parodies of 90s sitcoms with current celebrities as characters. The 'Friends but with Elon Musk' video has been DM-shared millions of times, sparking nostalgia and absurd humor across social platforms.

pulse_items.title: Major Earthquake Hits Tokyo, Tsunami Warning Issued
pulse_items.summary: A 7.2 magnitude earthquake struck near Tokyo, triggering tsunami warnings along Japan's eastern coast. Emergency services are responding as buildings swayed violently in live footage from the capital.

pulse_items.title: Taylor Swift Announces 'Midnights: The Quantum Edition'
pulse_items.summary: Taylor Swift surprise-announced a complete reimagining of her Midnights album using quantum computing algorithms to generate new musical arrangements. Pre-sales crashed Ticketmaster within minutes of the announcement.

pulse_items.title: NBA Playoffs Controversy Over AI Referee Calls
pulse_items.summary: The NBA's experimental AI referee system made three controversial calls in tonight's playoff games, sparking debates about technology in sports. Players and coaches are divided on whether to trust algorithmic officiating.

pulse_items.title: Discord Communities Obsessed with 'Ambient Gaming'
pulse_items.summary: Niche Discord servers are hyper-focused on 'ambient gaming' - playing games with minimal interaction to create atmospheric experiences. Communities share specific sound setups, lighting, and game combinations for maximum immersion.

pulse_items.title: Solar Flare Disrupts Global Satellite Networks
pulse_items.summary: A massive X-class solar flare is causing widespread disruption to satellite communications and GPS systems. Airlines are rerouting flights as space weather agencies issue warnings about potential power grid impacts.

pulse_items.title: Netflix's 'Chronos' Breaks Viewing Records
pulse_items.summary: The time-travel series 'Chronos' has become Netflix's most-watched show in its first 24 hours, with viewers obsessed with its complex temporal mechanics. Social media is filled with timeline diagrams and theory discussions.

pulse_items.title: Crypto 'Sleep Mining' Trend Takes Off
pulse_items.summary: A new proof-of-stake variant called 'sleep mining' rewards users for periods of wallet inactivity, creating ironic incentives in crypto communities. The trend combines wellness tracking with blockchain technology in unexpected ways.

pulse_items.title: AI Therapist Regulation Debate Heats Up
pulse_items.summary: Governments worldwide are debating how to regulate AI mental health tools after studies show mixed effectiveness. Professional organizations are divided between embracing innovation and protecting patient safety standards.

pulse_items.title: 'Office Plants with Personalities' Meme Format
pulse_items.summary: Workers are giving their office plants elaborate backstories and dramatic relationships in a new meme format. The trend combines workplace humor with absurdist character development for potted succulents and ferns.

pulse_items.title: Vertical Farming Investment Boom Continues
pulse_items.summary: Major investment firms are pouring billions into vertical farming technology as climate change threatens traditional agriculture. New skyscraper farms in urban centers are producing record yields of staple crops.
